zh.lifeSummary: 當Bennetta Pettit於1524年出生在英國英格蘭肯特明斯特時，她的父親Sir Valentine Pettit38歲，母親Lady Joana Beverley19歲。她和Thomas Chapman至少有4個兒子。她去世於1578年12月3日在英國英格蘭肯特法維沙安享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bennetta Pettit于1524年出生在英国英格兰肯特明斯特时，她的父亲Sir Valentine Pettit38岁，母亲Lady Joana Beverley19岁。她和Thomas Chapman至少有4个儿子。她去世于1578年12月3日在英国英格兰肯特法維沙安享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pettit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Petit
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Michel, Normand, Mireille, Philippe, Pierre, Achille, Armand, Jean Claude, Jean Jacques, Ketly, Adrien.

French, Walloon, Catalan, English, Jewish (from southern France), West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian: from (Old) French, Catalan, and Middle English petit ‘small’, hence a nickname for a small man (or an ironic nickname for a big man), or a distinguishing name for the younger of two bearers of the same personal name. Compare Little , Petee , and Petite .

History: Charles Petit from Anneville-Ambourville in Seine-Maritime, France, married Jeanne Rossignol (Martin and Renée Desjardins) in Quebec City, QC, in 1670. Nicolas Petit dit Lapré/Laprée from Le Gué-d'Alleré in Charente-Maritime, France, married Marie Pouponnel in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1656. Pierre Petit dit Gobin from Lyon in Rhône married Marguerite Véron in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1692. Pierre Petit dit Saint-Pierre from Évreux in Eure, France, married Judith Miville in Quebec City, QC, in 1758; see also St. Pierre . — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: Bennetta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The normal medieval vernacular form of   Benedict  , borne by women as well as men in the past. Now sometimes used as an antiquarian revival, but more often a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name.

variants.name: Bennet
meanings: The normal medieval vernacular form of   Benedict  , borne by women as well as men in the past. Now sometimes used as an antiquarian revival, but more often a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name.

variants.name: Benett
meanings: The normal medieval vernacular form of   Benedict  , borne by women as well as men in the past. Now sometimes used as an antiquarian revival, but more often a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name.

variants.name: Benet
meanings: From Church Latin benedictus ‘blessed’. This was the name of the saint ( c.480– c.550 ) who composed the Benedictine rule of Christian monastic life that is still followed in essence by all Western orders. He was born near Spoleto in Umbria, central Italy. After studying in Rome, he went to live as a hermit at Subiaco, and later organized groups of followers and imitators into monastic cells. In c.529 he moved to Monte Cassino, where he founded the great monastery that is still the centre of the Benedictine order. His rule is simple, restrained, and practical. See also Bennett .

en.lifeSummary: When Bennetta Pettit was born in 1524, in Minster, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Valentine Pettit, was 38 and her mother, Lady Joana Beverley, was 19. She had at least 4 sons with Thomas Chapman. She died on 3 December 1578, in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bennetta Pettit est née en 1524, à Minster, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Valentine Pettit, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Joana Beverley, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Thomas Chapman. Elle est décédée le 3 décembre 1578, à Faversham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bennetta Pettit 1524 in Minster, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Valentine Pettit 38 und ihre Mutter Lady Joana Beverley 19. Sie hatte mit Thomas Chapman mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 3. Dezember 1578 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bennetta Pettit è nata il nel 1524 nel Minster, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Valentine Pettit, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Lady Joana Beverley, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Thomas Chapman. Morì il 3 dicembre 1578, nel Faversham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bennetta Pettitが1524年にイギリスイギリスケントミンスターで生まれた時，父Sir Valentine Pettitは38歳，母Lady Joana Beverleyは19歳であった。彼女はThomas Chapmanとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1578年12月3日にイギリスイギリスケントファバーシャムで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bennetta Pettit(이)가 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Valentine Pettit(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joana Beverley(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Chapman(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1578년 12월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 파버샤에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Thomas Chapman. Ela faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1578, em Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bennetta Pettit родилась в 1524 г. в местности минстир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Valentine Pettit было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joana Beverley, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Thomas Chapman. Она умерла 3 декабря 1578 г. в местности фавиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bennetta Pettit nació en 1524, en Minster, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Valentine Pettit, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Lady Joana Beverley, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Thomas Chapman. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1578, en Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
